flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Leo University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.1k → $30.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Saint Leo University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.1k → $30.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Leo University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Saint Leo University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (34.6% → 38.2%).
